mapper.sql: cs.id, cs.counselor_id, su.name as counselor_name, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.status, cs.remark, count(a.id) as appointment_count, cs.create_time, cs.update_time
mapper.insert: insert into counselor_schedule ( counselor_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, status, remark, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{counselorId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select id, counselor_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, status, remark, create_time, update_time from counselor_schedule where id = #{id}

select
from counselor_schedule cs left join counselor c on cs.counselor_id = c.id left join sys_user su on c.user_id = su.id left join appointment a on cs.id = a.schedule_id where cs.id = #{id} group by cs.id, cs.counselor_id, su.name, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, cs.status, cs.remark, cs.create_time, cs.update_time
mapper.update: update counselor_schedule set counselor_id = #{counselorId}, schedule_date = #{scheduleDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update counselor_schedule set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
